items.text:
CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM

“Stars Above Us”

Filming Dates: June 5–7, 2026
Location: Bowling Green, Kentucky
Audition Type: Self-tapes only
Unpaid - student film - Non-union.

Film Plot

Stars Above Us is a powerful coming-of-age drama about friendship, mental health, and the signs people often miss.

The story follows Eli, a quiet high school student, and his best friend Lina Carmichael — a bold, rebellious girl who seems fearless on the outside. While Lina jokes, skips class, and stares at the stars dreaming of something bigger, she secretly struggles with feelings of isolation and depression.

As Eli and their friend Becca begin to notice Lina pulling away, tensions rise at school with bullying and pressure from their peers. What seems like ordinary teenage drama slowly reveals deeper pain beneath the surface. When Lina disappears from school, Eli is forced to confront the truth he never saw coming.

The film explores grief, friendship, and the importance of recognizing when someone you care about is hurting.

Character Breakdown

Lina Carmichael

Gender: Female
Age Range: 16–20 (to play 16)
Lead Role

Lina Carmichael is bold, funny, and rebellious. She walks through the halls like she owns the place — wearing ripped clothes, spiked heels, and a fearless grin. She’s the kind of person who asks ridiculous “would you rather” questions and drags her friends into skipping class just for the adventure.

But beneath the confidence, Lina feels deeply out of place in the world. She carries emotional wounds from her past and struggles with depression she doesn’t fully understand or know how to explain. At times she’s vulnerable, distant, and overwhelmed by feelings she tries to hide behind humor and attitude.

Key Traits
 • Charismatic and energetic
 • Sharp wit and sarcastic humor
 • Emotionally complex and vulnerable
 • Fiercely independent
 • Capable of explosive anger and quiet heartbreak

This role requires an actress who can balance strong personality with subtle emotional depth. Lina is both the brightest presence in the room and the quietest cry for help.

Audition Information

Audition Type: Self-Tape Submission Only

To Submit:
Email Cassidy Shortridge, Casting Coordinator at
cassidy.shortridge@yahoo.com

Include:
 • Subject Line: Your Name – Role Submission
 • Name
 • Age
 • Headshot
 • Resume (if available)
 • Self-tape audition for Lina Carmichael

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL – KUYA (Short Film)**

We are currently looking for people of **Filipino heritage** to participate in a short film titled *Kuya*. The film explores themes of brotherhood, childhood trauma, and the cycle of violence that can be passed down through generations.

This is a **student short film produced by a professional and safety-conscious team**, including crew members trained in **stunts and fight choreography**. All physical scenes will be carefully choreographed and supervised to ensure everyone’s safety and comfort.

**Important notes:**
• All roles are **non-speaking**
• **Acting experience is not required**
• Performers will be treated with **respect, care, and professionalism at all times**
• Participation is voluntary

*Kuya* aims to raise awareness about **domestic abuse and child abuse**, and how cycles of violence can shape relationships within families. At its core, the film asks an important question: **how can these cycles be broken?**

If you or someone you know may be interested in participating, please reach out via DM or email for more information.

Thank you for helping us tell this story.

**Location**:

Bournemouth, UK

**Contact**:

qaldasm@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'A Bournemouth University Masters Production KUYA Casting Call Two estranged brothersconfront brothers their past when they face each other an undergroune fight. Male Actor: 20-30 Filipino 2 male child actors: 9-15 Filipino FilmingDates: Dates: 26.29 26 March 29t March Contact: qaldasm@gmail.com mail.com'

items.text:
Jeremy Holzl am Set: Respekt für Deine Beständigkeit 

Jeremy, diese drei Bilder stehen für genau das, was am Set zählt: stille Verlässlichkeit, echte Kollegialität und ein Mensch, auf den man sich einfach freuen kann und all dies mit drei Deiner starken unverwechselbaren Gesichtsausdrücke! 

Als Komparse, u. a. in der RTL Serie "Alles was zählt" und "Unter uns" bist Du nicht nur jemand, der da ist, wenn es drauf ankommt, sondern jemand, der mit Haltung, Respekt und einer angenehm ruhigen Art das Setklima spürbar besser macht. Genau diese Beständigkeit, dieses unaufgeregte Dranbleiben, macht am Ende den Unterschied, weil damit Schritt für Schritt Dinge möglich werden, die vorher nur wie ein Wunsch wirkten. 

Und dann kommt noch etwas dazu, das viele unterschätzen: Du bist auch Fahrer für ein Unternehmen, das Schauspieler zuverlässig ans Set und in Hotels bringt. Das heißt, Du hältst Abläufe am Laufen, bevor die Kamera überhaupt angeht, und genau dafür gebührt Dir genauso Anerkennung wie für alles, was man im Bild sieht. 

Wir zwei, Christian und Sandra, sind jedes Mal wirklich froh, wenn wir am Set mit Dir sind, weil Du genau diese Mischung mitbringst: professionell, menschlich, kollegial. Danke, dass Du so bist, wie Du bist, und dass Du Deine Energie so konstant in dieses Umfeld gibst. 

Wenn Du Jeremy schon am Set erlebt hast, was schätzt Du an seiner Art am meisten, und wen sollte ich als nächstes mit so einer Collage ehren?

Idee, Bilder und Text Christian Weiße und Sandra Wötzel 

#JeremyHolzl #AllesWasZaehlt #UnterUns #RTL #SetLife

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people, beard and text that says 'Idee & Bild ©hristian Weiße @hristianWeißeKöin Köln ← jeremy_holzl Jeremy JeremyHölzi Hölzl 56 896 Beiträge Follower ලි jeremy_holzl jeremy. 429 Gefolgt'

message.text: Ein Rosenkrieg bezeichnet eine extrem heftige, von Hass und Zerstörungswillen geprägte Scheidungs- oder Trennungsschlacht, bei der Ex-Partner versuchen, sich gegenseitig maximal zu schaden. Der Begriff leitet sich von den englischen Thronfolgekämpfen (1455–1485) zwischen den Häusern York und Lancaster ab, die Wappenrosen, so Google 🌹💥

items.text:
Film Title: Chinese Whispers
We are casting for an upcoming university short film project filming in Newcastle upon Tyne, specifically in the Jesmond Area. 

Due to University regulations, this will be an unpaid student production. The shooting will take place over 3-5 days in late March. 

Things included: 

Travel expenses 

Food provided on shoot days 

Footage shared with actor’s upon request.

 

Movie log line: Working behind the counter of a sketchy Newcastle off licence, Lola pieces together the fractured history of two alcoholic regulars, only to discover their bitter separation was built on a simple miscommunication that might still be undone. 

Roles we are searching for: 

Lola (Shopkeeper): 

Playing Age: 18 - 30 

Character: Sassy, confident, and emotionally intelligent. Lola knows everything about everyone and is always observing. She is inquisitive and sharp, and her goal in the short film is to reconcile a broken-up couple throughout the film 

 

Maggie: 

Playing Age: 40+

Character: Naïve, vulnerable, and an “oversharer”. Maggie is stubborn and in denial about her alcoholism and past relationship. She often claims she “gets drinks for her nerves” when at the shop. 

 

John: 

Playing Age: 40+

Character: Rambunctious and large in personality. John is open about being an alcoholic, slightly sluggish, and talks about Maggie often at the shop. His drinking leads him to reveal personal information to Lola. 

 

Please register your interest by sending an inquiry email to castingbrookehope@gmail.com. Further information regarding casting/auditions will be provided upon your registration of interest.

BASED IN: FURTHER DETAILS:'

# **🎬Casting Call! For a STUDENT FILM ‘Playback’🎬 URGENT!**

📍**LOCATION:** Hitchin

📆 **DATES:** Tuesday 17th March – Thursday 19th March

💵 **EXPENSES:** Travel and food expenses will be covered

 

**THERAPIST (Monica/Mark): **An **intelligent and compassionate** therapist who remains **calm** under the pressure of her recent client, Zak, who is certain that he sees things in his sleep. They stay **rational and grounded** around Zak - until unsettling evidence suggests something far more disturbing is happening, which results in a** subtle shift **from** confidence to quiet dread.**

**PLAYING AGE: 20+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**MOTHER/FATHER (Helen/Harry): **A **caring and devoted parent** of Zak who only wants the best for him, through finding it tough to stay strong and rational. Constantly trying to **talk it through** with Zak and questioning his apparent instability while conveying a **maternal instinct** yet a quiet, **emotional strain** as they see Zak spiralling out of control.  

**PLAYING AGE: 30+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**📖SYNOPSIS:** After coming face to face with a sinister figure in the middle of the night, Zak; a young man suffering with mental health issues (or so he’s been told), decides to film himself whilst he sleeps to prove that the figure is more than just an illusion. These odd behaviours are worrying to his **mother/father,** who want the best for him. After showing the footage to his **therapist** (who claims to see nothing), he decides that it is time to take things into his own hands. Instead of going to sleep, he waits for the figure to strike and deals a killing blow. Having caught it all on camera, he shows the proof to his **therapist,** who soon realises that the figure was Zak’s **mother/father** and that perhaps their next session should be separated by a prison cell...

 

Please email [playbacktalent@gmail.com](mailto:playbacktalent@gmail.com) if you are interested, or want further information, with a headshot and showreel if applicable! 😊

items.text:
CASTING CALL – EXTRAS NEEDED FOR SPIDER-MAN FAN FILM NON-PAYED 

We are currently casting a small group of background extras for an emotional street scene in our upcoming Spider-Man fan film, “Becoming Our Spider-Man.”

SCENE DESCRIPTION:  
This scene takes place after Spider-Man fails to save one of his allies and is left injured and emotionally broken while the Hobgoblin threatens to finish him. A group of everyday New Yorkers step forward to defend Spider-Man, standing between him and the villain. Inspired by the powerful “You wanna get to him, you gotta go through me” moment, the people of the city remind Spider-Man that it wasn’t his fault, that he tried his best, and that even heroes can’t save everyone. The crowd encourages him to get back up and stop the Goblin.

WHO WE NEED:
• Around 10 background extras  
• All genders, ages 18+  
• Any ethnicity  
• Comfortable performing crowd reactions and possibly a few short supportive lines

PAY / COMPENSATION:
• Volunteer / unpaid background role  
• Food and drinks will be provided on set  
• Great opportunity for actors who want experience in a dramatic superhero scene

LOCATION:
London area (exact filming location will be provided after casting)

TO APPLY:
Please send the following:
• Name  
• Age  
• A recent photo/headshot  
• Any acting experience 

Email submissions to: ppeterb954@gmail.com

Subject line: “Spider-Man Extras Casting”

Be part of the crowd that reminds Spider-Man why the city still believes in him.

items.text:
Looking for black child actress for short Film
I’m working on a 70s inspired psychological thriller short film about a birthday party gone wrong. The film follows a family of 6 living in a dysfunctional household.

I’m looking for a black child actress to play Zunah, the eldest daughter. Playing age: 10

Shooting dates: TBC (4 days)

If you’re a parent or guardian, email info@alessiamavakala.com with a headshot of your child and general availability to express interest.

My website is alessiamavakala.com if you want to check my previous work

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

** **

**serial fabularny – EPIZODY DZIECIĘCE**

 

Na wiosnę ruszamy z nowym serialem fabularnym, a do którego teraz szukamy **CHŁOPCÓW 8-10 LAT z doświadczeniem** **epizodycznym** na planach zdjęciowych.

Chłopcy muszą płynnie mówić po polsku, bez akcentu.

Chętnie zobaczymy tu bliźniaków.

 

Stawki ustalane indywidualnie. Wybory należą do reżysera.

 

***Do zgłoszenia proszę załączyć aktualną wizytówkę dziecka jako link do You Tube***

*** ***

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **CHŁOPIEC**

W treści: imię i nazwisko dziecka i rodzica, wiek dziecka, nr telefonu, miejscowość, wzrost

W załączniku: **aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

items.text:
🎬 UWAGA CASTING – FILM O TEMATYCE PSYCHOLOGICZNEJ

Poszukujemy aktorów w wieku 16–70 lat do niezależnego filmu o tematyce psychologicznej.
Projekt realizowany jest non-profit przez grupę młodych i kreatywnych ludzi.

📍 Nagrania będą realizowane w Dąbrowie Górniczej.

Nie wymagamy doświadczenia aktorskiego – szukamy osób autentycznych, które chcą spróbować swoich sił przed kamerą.

Jak się zgłosić?
Prosimy o przesłanie:

1️⃣ Krótkiego nagrania wideo, na którym:
 • przedstawisz się,
 • powiesz fragment prozy, wiersza lub zaprezentujesz krótką etiudę aktorską.

2️⃣ Aktualnego zdjęcia.

Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać w wiadomości prywatnej lub na podany kontakt.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people, poster, magazine and text that says 'UWAGA CASTING! POSZUKIWANI AKTORZY W PRZEDZIALE 16-70 70 LAT OFERTA NON PROFIT! DOŠWIADCZENIE NIE JEST WYMAGANE! DIRECTOR ปี'

items.summary:
🎬 UWAGA CASTING – FILM O TEMATYCE PSYCHOLOGICZNEJ

Poszukujemy aktorów w wieku 16–70 lat do niezależnego filmu o tematyce psychologicznej.
Projekt realizowany jest non-profit przez grupę młodych i kreatywnych ludzi.

📍 Nagrania będą realizowane w Dąbrowie Górniczej.

Nie wymagamy doświadczenia aktorskiego – szukamy osób autentycznych, które chcą spróbować swoich sił przed kamerą.

Jak się zgłosić?
Prosimy o przesłanie:

1️⃣ Krótkiego nagrania wideo, na którym:
 • przedstawisz się,
 • powiesz fragment prozy, wiersza lub zaprezentujesz krótką etiudę aktorską.

2️⃣ Aktualnego zdjęcia.

Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać w wiadomości prywatnej lub na podany kontakt.

message.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel spricht Elisabeth Monamy über das Out-Of-The-Box-Denken. 

 

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 166. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 17.03.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

🎤 Vortrag: Dr. Paul Hertel 
🎙️ Moderation: Michael Weilguny 

Regionales und internationales Kunstschaffen – wie gelingt nachhaltiger Erfolg im Musikbusiness? 

Der Komponist, Produzent, Autor und Vizepräsident der AKM Dr. Paul Hertel spricht über das Leben als Künstler zwischen regionaler Verankerung und internationaler Präsenz. Wo liegen Chancen, wo Risiken? Und wie kann man sich trotz KI, Marktveränderungen und steigender Konkurrenz langfristig einen eigenständigen Platz erarbeiten und sichern? 

Ein Frühstück für alle, die künstlerisch denken und unternehmerisch handeln wollen. 

© privat 

 

📲 Mehr Infos & Anmeldung: www.KünstlerBusinessFrühstück.at 
und https://fb.me/e/8GQHxpy5q 

 

#künstlerinnenbusinessfrühstück #kbf #zeitgeistvienna  #musik #akm #composer

short_form_video_context.track_title: Ella Fitzgerald · It's A Lovely Day Today

message.text:
Na na na, wo siehst du hin😉 

Wir feiern die Woche starker und selbstbewusster Frauen 💐 
Die Atelier Galerie Roland Puschitz zeigt diese Woche 2 Ausstellungen zum Thema 👍 
Morgen Dienstag 03.03.2026 um 19:00 Uhr die erst im Amtshaus Wieden, kommt vorbei und hört wundervolle Musik in Frauentöne von CLARIVOCE und beäugt dabei die selbstbewussten Bilder von Judith Reßler. 

Die Ausschnitte in diesem Reel versprechen sehr spannende Kunstwerke. 

Amtshaus Festsaal Wieden 
Favoritenstraße 18,  1040 Wien 

www.puschitz.at 
https://www.puschitz.at/verkauf/ 

Gratis Platzreservierungen unter 
roland@puschitz.at 
+436765219895 

#ateliergalerierolandpuschitz #rolandpuschitz
#contemporary #follower #judithressler

🎬 UWAGA CASTING – FILM O TEMATYCE PSYCHOLOGICZNEJ

Poszukujemy aktorów w wieku 16–70 lat do niezależnego filmu o tematyce psychologicznej.
Projekt realizowany jest non-profit przez grupę młodych i kreatywnych ludzi.

📍 Nagrania będą realizowane w Dąbrowie Górniczej.

Nie wymagamy doświadczenia aktorskiego – szukamy osób autentycznych, które chcą spróbować swoich sił przed kamerą.

Jak się zgłosić?
Prosimy o przesłanie:

1️⃣ Krótkiego nagrania wideo, na którym:
 • przedstawisz się,
 • powiesz fragment prozy, wiersza lub zaprezentujesz krótką etiudę aktorską.

2️⃣ Aktualnego zdjęcia.

Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać w wiadomości prywatnej lub na podany kontakt.

items.text:
WROCŁAW // NA RATUNEK 112
PILNE!!!

Do serialu "Na Ratunek 112" nadal poszukujemy aktorów i aktorek do następujących ról:

UWAGA - proszę o uważne przeczytanie charakterystyki i wieku postaci - zgłoszenia kompletnie niezgodne z rolą nie będą rozpatrywane.

13.03 (PIĄTEK) - 14.03 (SOBOTA)

EWELINA Krajewska (23-29 lat) - Młoda atrakcyjna kobieta, wychowana w skromnych warunkach przez samotną matkę. Zakochana w Patryku, planuje z nim przyszłość. Okazuje się, że cierpi na przedwczesną menopauzę. Mimo presji matki, decyduje się wyznać prawdę narzeczonemu. Po rozstaniu odnajduje prawdziwą miłość ze Sławkiem, który akceptuje ją taką, jaka jest.

13.03 (PIĄTEK) - 14.03 (SOBOTA)

PATRYK Słowiński (25-31 lat) - Syn bogatych właścicieli sieci aptek. Na pozór kulturalny i zakochany w Ewelinie, w rzeczywistości bardziej dba o interesy rodzinne i spadek. Gdy dowiaduje się o chorobie Eweliny, zrywa zaręczyny. Ukrywa, że zdradził ją z prostytutką i zaraził się wirusem zapalenia wątroby typu B, narażając również ją na zakażenie.

Płatność gotówką od razu po planie, ceny ustalane w zależności od roli. Zwracamy koszty dojazdu do Wrocławia, a dla roli PATRYKA zapewniamy również nocleg.

Osoby zainteresowane proszę o wysłanie wiadomości o treści:

"Zgłoszenie do 112, odc. 1164 + IMIĘ postaci"

wraz z AKTUALNYM zdjęciem oraz wideo wizytówką (ok. 1-minutowe nagranie w którym przedstawiamy się, mówimy o swoim doświadczeniu aktorskim, pasjach i hobby)

WhatsApp'em numer:

+48 798 970 883

lub na maila:

lukasz.wrzeszczynski-siuda@polotmedia.pl

Proszę o kontakt WYŁĄCZNIE osoby dyspozycyjne w podanych terminach i przedziale wiekowym 😊

Czekam na zgłoszenia!

Busch Gardens Williamsburg is casting for Summer, Howl‑O‑Scream, and Christmas Town production shows - and we’re looking for performers ready to bring serious energy to our stages!!!

Submit your headshot, resume, and performance materials to: BGWauditions@seaworld.com

Your next big offer could be with us!!

🎪 CASTING CALL – DUO CHINESE POLE
We are currently looking for a strong and dynamic Duo Chinese Pole act (Male/Male or Male/Female) for a new Show on board a cruise ship.

📅 Contract start: Mid-May 2026

🛳 Location: Cruise ship sailing in Europe

📆 Contract until: January 31, 2027 (flexible)

We are searching for experienced performers with a powerful and high-level act.

If you or someone you know would be interested, please send:

• Photos

• Performance reels / videos

• Short information about the act

📩 Send your materials to:

artemparuvintov@gmail.com

 

Feel free to tag or share with performers who might be interested!

items.text:
**Title:** Exit Wound 

**Genre:** Drama

**Logline:** A young man chooses between love and opportunity as he breaks news that could have devastating implications to his relationship over an anniversary dinner.

**Role: **RICK (30's-50's) Rick is confident, charismatic, and commanding but the charm masks deep insecurity. He clings to control as the only way he knows how to keep someone close. He fears abandonment but fears being truly seen even more.

**Director/Writer:** Gatlin Zbylski 

**Assistant Director: **Jack Brown

**Production Type:** Student Film

**Contact Information:** Please send all submissions to gatlinjack777@gmail.com. Either Director or Assistant Director will follow up with you.

**Run Time:** Short. 7-11 Minutes.

**Compensation: **Unpaid. Meal and Reel provided!

**Union Status: **Non-stop

**Audition Information:** Please send Headshot, Resume, and attached self-tape audition sides to gatlinjack777@gmail.com no later than ***Friday, 03/13/26 by 8PM. ***Reels accepted but not required.

**Shooting Schedule:** March 20th, night shoot. March 21st, day shoot begins in afternoon. Exact times TBD.

**Filming Location: **11553 Pink Phlox Drive Parker, Colorado 80134.

**Project Description: **Light intimacy (kissing) and combat (thrown dinner plate at other character) required for role. Any combat or matters of intimacy will be detailed in the Intimacy Consent Form, discussed in depth, and rehearsed to Actor's comfort level.

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL – INDEPENDENT SHORT FILM
📍 Grand Rapids, Michigan

KingsVisuals Productions is casting for a faith-based supernatural thriller short film titled “The Price of Power.”

!All races are invited and welcome!

We are currently looking for strong actors for several main roles.
Filming will take place in the Grand Rapids area and is scheduled for Summer 2026.

 IMPORTANT

This is a non-paid project, but actors will receive:
• On-screen film credit
• Professional footage for your reel
• Meals / catering on set
• Transportation support if you live within 30 minutes of Grand Rapids
• Opportunity to work on a high-quality cinematic project
This is a great opportunity for actors who want to build their portfolio, reel, or IMDb credits.

ROLES WE ARE CASTING

GLORIA (Lead Role)
Female | Age 9–12
A strong and intelligent child who carries a mysterious spiritual authority. She must balance innocence with quiet strength.
(Parent/guardian required on set.)

MICHAEL (Lead Role)
Male | Age 25–35
A struggling but compassionate man who unexpectedly becomes Gloria’s protector. Honest, grounded, and emotionally expressive.

NATAS (Main Villain)
Male | Age 30–50
Charismatic yet intimidating supernatural antagonist. Calm, manipulative, and powerful presence.

PASTOR JOHN
Male | Age 35–60
A pastor under financial pressure who becomes tempted by supernatural power. A complex character with a strong emotional arc.

PASTOR SAMUEL
Male | Age 45–75
A wise and spiritually grounded former pastor who understands the ancient covenant behind the rings.

 HOW TO SUBMIT
Please send:
• Your name
• Age
• Headshot or recent photo
• Acting experience (if any)
• Demo reel (optional but preferred)
• Your location
Send submissions to:
📧 Kingsideview@gmail.com

We are building a passionate team for this project and looking for actors who want to be part of something meaningful and cinematic.
Please share this post with actors who may be interested.
🎥 KingsVisuals Productions

items.text:
CASTING CALL – STUDENT SHORT FILM
Location: Glasgow & surrounding areas

We are currently casting for an upcoming student short film production and are looking for an actress to take on a supporting role.

Role:

Dr. Holloway – Woman, playing age 45–60

Synopsis:

Maya attends her weekly therapy session with Dr. Holloway, where she speaks about her emotional numbness, dissociation, and the persistent feeling of being unloved—especially by her own mother. As the session unfolds, Dr. Holloway listens carefully and offers only brief prompts, allowing Maya’s words and behaviour to reveal more than she intends, ultimately forcing her to question what is real and what is not.

Production Details:

• Location: Glasgow (exact location TBC)

• Shoot Dates: Between 20 April – 8 May

• Type: Student short film

Compensation:

This is an unpaid role, however travel expenses and food will be provided during filming.

How to Apply:

If interested, please email:

📧 olkarolina@icloud.com

Big milestone for New Jersey’s production future. The momentum at Fort Monmouth is a signal that NJ is building real infrastructure—jobs, training, and long-term opportunity for filmmakers and creators.
From Jersey City, we’re ready for the wave.

#NJFilm #NewJerseyFilm #FilmIndustry #FilmProduction #JerseyCity #VirtualProduction #NJCreators #ProductionJobs 

The official closing of Netflix on Fort Monmouth affirms that the birthplace of film is where its future is being built once again.

items.text:
ISO: PAID **SFX Makeup Artist Needed – Short Film Production (Atlanta, GA)**

**Project Type:** Narrative/Period themed Short Film
**Filming Dates:** March 21–23, 2026
**Location:** Atlanta, Georgia

**Responsibilities:**
* Provide on-set makeup for **6 actors** (4 African American actors and 2 White American actors)
* Design and apply **bruise and facial injury effects** for ONE principal character (final shoot day)

**Requirements:**
* Experience with **SFX makeup**, particularly bruising and injury effects
* Experience working with **diverse skin tones**
* Ability to work efficiently on set and handle quick touch-ups between takes
* Must provide your **own makeup kit **

**Submission Instructions:**
Please send the following for consideration:
* Your **day rate**
* **Kit fee**
* **Portfolio / examples of previous work**

items.text:
**🎬Casting Call! For a STUDENT FILM ‘Playback’🎬 URGENT!**

📍**LOCATION:** Hitchin

📆 **DATES:** Tuesday 17th March – Thursday 19th March

💵 **EXPENSES:** Travel and food expenses will be covered

 

**THERAPIST (Monica/Mark): **An **intelligent and compassionate** therapist who remains **calm** under the pressure of her recent client, Zak, who is certain that he sees things in his sleep. They stay **rational and grounded** around Zak - until unsettling evidence suggests something far more disturbing is happening, which results in a** subtle shift **from** confidence to quiet dread.**

**PLAYING AGE: 20+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**MOTHER/FATHER (Helen/Harry): **A **caring and devoted parent** of Zak who only wants the best for him, through finding it tough to stay strong and rational. Constantly trying to **talk it through** with Zak and questioning his apparent instability while conveying a **maternal instinct** yet a quiet, **emotional strain** as they see Zak spiralling out of control. 

**PLAYING AGE: 30+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**📖SYNOPSIS:** After coming face to face with a sinister figure in the middle of the night, Zak; a young man suffering with mental health issues (or so he’s been told), decides to film himself whilst he sleeps to prove that the figure is more than just an illusion. These odd behaviours are worrying to his **mother/father,** who want the best for him. After showing the footage to his **therapist** (who claims to see nothing), he decides that it is time to take things into his own hands. Instead of going to sleep, he waits for the figure to strike and deals a killing blow. Having caught it all on camera, he shows the proof to his **therapist,** who soon realises that the figure was Zak’s **mother/father** and that perhaps their next session should be separated by a prison cell...

 

Please email [playbacktalent@gmail.com](mailto:playbacktalent@gmail.com) if you are interested, or want further information, with a headshot and showreel if applicable! 😊

items.text:
**EMERGENCY CASTING CALL! SHORT FILM LEAD ACTOR WANTED!**

Our previous actor dropped out so we are urgently searching for a lead actor for our upcoming short film, 'Stages'.

'Stages' follows Francis, who goes to therapy to deal with his recent divorce, spiralling backwards through the stages of grief before he is forced to confront the reality of his denial.

**Genre:** drama, psychological

**CASTING Brief details:**
* Adult male, **late 20s - 50s**
* Filming based **Portsmouth **
* **£150** wage or for travel expense coverage (can be stretched to £200 if travel expenses require)

**REHEARSAL DATES** (not necessary to attend but would be ideal):
* **Thursday 12th March**
* **Friday 13th March**

**SHOOT DATES** (unmovable, must attend, **12pm - 10pm**):
* **Monday 16th - Wednesday 18th**
* Another date in April TBC

Please email **rishchakraborty@gmail.com **if interested!!!

**Deadline: **Tuesday 10th March

Email rishchakraborty@gmail.com ASAP if you are interested! Deadline: Tuesday 10th March'

Sesja realizowana jest na użytek wewnętrzny klienta (bez publikacji) – w ramach projektu technologicznego mającego na celu odróżnianie zdjęć profesjonalnych od amatorskich.

Płatność po podpisaniu umowy na planie oraz wykonaniu zdjęć!

Schludne, nowoczesne stylizacje, kolorowe, jak zdjęcia na insta.

items.text:
Your weekly international comedy meetup in the heart of Warsaw ❣️🤍
Live comedy. Real presence. Shared space.

We host a weekly English-language comedy night where people come together to laugh, listen, and connect in the same room.

Stand-up, improv, and occasional surprises, always live, always shaped by the people who show up.

It’s not about being the biggest or loudest show in town.
It’s about creating a space where comedy feels human again.
Each night is a little different.
Some shows lean more toward stand-up, others toward improv or playful experimentation. Sometimes something unexpected sneaks in. Nothing is repeated exactly the same way twice.

You’ll see a mix of bold local and international comedians, first-timers taking their first five minutes on stage, and more experienced performers trying new material in front of a real audience.

We’re not chasing trends.
We’re simply building something consistent, welcoming, and alive.
Hosted by Miguel Ferreira
A Brazilian comedian based in Warsaw, curious about people, culture, and what happens when strangers laugh together.

Why this exists
Because people miss being in rooms.
Because shared laughter still works.
Because live moments feel different when you’re actually there.
This isn’t background entertainment.
It’s something you’re part of.
Schedule
Happy Hour & Meet & Greet: 7:00 PM
Show starts: 8:00 PM
Location
Południk Zero
Wilcza 25, Warsaw
15 minutes from Pałac Kultury

🎟 Tickets:
https://fienta.com/2-0-comedy-show2-154404

🐾 Well-behaved pets are welcome.
🎤 Thinking about performing?

Each show keeps one spot open for a first-time performer.
Five minutes. One mic. A real audience.
📍 Impact Warsaw
Instagram: @impactwarsaw, @miguelatcomedy
Events: impactwarsaw.com/events
Inner Circle: https://t.me/+xJpuxiG5Au8xMmZk
If you’re curious, you’re welcome.
If you need a break from scrolling, come sit with us.
Just show up and see what happens.

items.text:
Jeremy Holzl am Set: Respekt für Deine Beständigkeit 

Jeremy, diese drei Bilder stehen für genau das, was am Set zählt: stille Verlässlichkeit, echte Kollegialität und ein Mensch, auf den man sich einfach freuen kann und all dies mit drei Deiner starken unverwechselbaren Gesichtsausdrücke! 

Als Komparse, u. a. in der RTL Serie "Alles was zählt" und "Unter uns" bist Du nicht nur jemand, der da ist, wenn es drauf ankommt, sondern jemand, der mit Haltung, Respekt und einer angenehm ruhigen Art das Setklima spürbar besser macht. Genau diese Beständigkeit, dieses unaufgeregte Dranbleiben, macht am Ende den Unterschied, weil damit Schritt für Schritt Dinge möglich werden, die vorher nur wie ein Wunsch wirkten. 

Und dann kommt noch etwas dazu, das viele unterschätzen: Du bist auch Fahrer für ein Unternehmen, das Schauspieler zuverlässig ans Set und in Hotels bringt. Das heißt, Du hältst Abläufe am Laufen, bevor die Kamera überhaupt angeht, und genau dafür gebührt Dir genauso Anerkennung wie für alles, was man im Bild sieht. 

Wir zwei, Christian und Sandra, sind jedes Mal wirklich froh, wenn wir am Set mit Dir sind, weil Du genau diese Mischung mitbringst: professionell, menschlich, kollegial. Danke, dass Du so bist, wie Du bist, und dass Du Deine Energie so konstant in dieses Umfeld gibst. 

Wenn Du Jeremy schon am Set erlebt hast, was schätzt Du an seiner Art am meisten, und wen sollte ich als nächstes mit so einer Collage ehren?

Idee, Bilder und Text Christian Weiße und Sandra Wötzel 

#JeremyHolzl #AllesWasZaehlt #UnterUns #RTL #SetLife

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people, beard and text that says "Idee & Bild ©hristian Weiße @hristianWeißeKöin Köln ← jeremy_holzl Jeremy JeremyHölzi Hölzl 56 896 Beiträge Follower ලි jeremy_holzl jeremy. 429 Gefolgt"

items.text:
STATISTER SØGES TIL KORTFILM (ULØNNET)
Vi er et filmhold fra filmhøjskolen Potemkin i Aarhus og er i gang med at lave en kortfilm, som skal optages ved Hjerl Hede. Hertil har vi brug for statister til at medvirke i en retssagsscene anno 1721.

Lyder det som noget for dig? Så tøv ikke med at kontakte vores producer på:

marie.korsgaard.rasmussen@gmail.com

items.text:
You’re walking onto set. Your name is on the trailer door.
Six months earlier you were just another actor sending a self tape.

What changed?

Your audition worked.

This week we’re teaching a free acting class:
🎬 How to Book a Netflix Show 

KC & Donna-Marie teach you:
• what casting directors notice in the first few seconds
 • why some actors look real on camera and others look like they’re acting
 • the simple technique that makes auditions feel alive

If you want to work in film and TV, come join us.
Click the link and come to your FREE ACTING CLASS:
https://www.screenactingschool.com/opt-in-2ac92b3d-1cf7-4d50-87c1-94c0fc3d7dd9 

⏰ Free Acting Class — Tuesday

🇨🇦🇺🇸 12:30 PM — Vancouver / Los Angeles 

🇬🇧 7:30 PM — London

CASTING CALL FOR A STUDENT FILM
2 lead roles available and extras wanted!!

Unpaid roles, however basic expenses

are covered.

Greater Manchester based.

Self tapes wanted, contact elporter222@gmail.com if you’re interested and want to know more!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of skateboard and text that says 'CASTING CALL LEO Playing age: 16-19 (Over 18s only) Skater/2000s 2000s fashion sense. Upper class but portrays himself as lower class. Outgoing, confident and sociable. Thrives on connection and enjoys making others feel included. FREE SKATEBOARD INCLUDED'

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CAHL CLEM ............... Playing age: 14-18 (Over 18s only) Streetwear/2000s fashion sense. Middle class: Upper class accent, well spoken. Observant and introspective, navigating early independence with curiosity. Carries a subtle E intensity that draws people in. @Measuresshort'

May be a graphic of text that says 'SUNOPSIS Set over a single afternoon in a skatepark, the film follows 16yr old Clem as she reconnects with old friend Leo, who offers to teach her how to skate. He refills her cup between attempts, starting as a sinister favour. As Clem continues, intoxi intoxication begins to compromise her balance and judgement, increasing the risk of each attempt. Leo's encouragement shifts into control as he recognises her growing instability. In the exposed park, Clem's deterioration becomes visible to others, raising questions of responsibility and transforming what began as a carefree reunion into a situation marked by vulnerability. @Measuresshort'

items.text:
AUDITIONS FOR THE SULTAN OF SULU 

*We are seeking actors to be in our revival of George Ade's classic comic light opera. Actors of Central Asian and/or Filipino descent are encouraged to audition.*

The Sultan of Sulu, named Ki-Ram, along with his wife, concubines, and his Private Secretary Hadji, get tangled up in the Americans' efforts to bring "democracy" and "civilization" to Sulu, born from the dreaming mind of George Ade.

***Rehearsals***:

*April 4, April 11, May 2, June 20 & June 26 at 6 Monteith Dr, Farmington, CT 06032 and May 9, May 16, May 23, May 30 at 281 Country Club Rd, Avon, CT 06001*

*Rehearsal Times: Rehearsal Times: 10:30pm to 2:30pm.*

*Performance Date: June 27 (1 pm.)*

*Performance Space: 6 Monteith Dr, Farmington, CT 06032.*

**Volunteer, Non Union, No Travel or Board Provided**

https://forms.gle/9zJKQNpygPh4L7KRA

items.text:
RUSH CASTING CALL – ATLANTA

Project: Millenni Productions Web Series
Role: Daryl (Supporting)

Location: Atlanta, GA
Shoot Dates: March 22nd 
Rate: Paid 

Character Description – Daryl
Male, mid 20s to early 30s.
Confident, polished, and successful. Daryl is an established restaurant owner who carries himself like a man who has built something from the ground up. He’s smooth, charismatic, and comfortable in his environment. The type of guy people respect when he walks in the room.

Daryl is also a regular client at Sean’s barbershop and has a complicated history with Tayana.

Role Type: Supporting
Ethnicity: black 
Acting Experience: Preferred but not required

To Submit:
Send the following to: movies@millenniproductions.com

• Headshot or recent photo
• Acting reel (if available)
• Name, age, height
• Contact information
• Atlanta-based talent only

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – ELDERLY ACTORS 60+ (EDINBURGH and LONDON)

We are casting for a **short emotional film about love, memory, and unfinished stories**.

**Looking for real couples or individuals welcome**

We are looking for:

• **Male actor (65–85)** – white/grey hair, gentle and thoughtful presence
• **Female actor (60–85)** – white/grey hair, elegant and warm presence

The story follows an elderly man who travels to Edinburgh from London to find the woman he loved when they were young.

📍** Main filming location:** Edinburgh
📅 **Filming date:** 15th March 2026
💰 **Paid role**
🚆 **Travel and accommodation can be covered**

This is a heartfelt story-driven project and we are looking for actors who can bring authenticity and emotional depth to the roles.

If interested, please send:
• A recent photo or a short introduction video

You can message me directly or email: tangmengdan@msn.cn

Thank you!

topComments.text: 'Elderly', hah!
Ken Kitson

items.text:
**URGENT CASTING CALL - Student Film *London Based***

Looking for supporting actors to play presidential advisors in a short film made by students at the University of Westminster on March 13, 14, and 15, call times around 9:00 AM and wrap at 20-21:00 though it varies based on day. Unpaid role but travel is reimbursed and catering is provided. 

Orange Monday is a political dark comedy, and we're preferably looking for men aged 55-80. 

Please contact w2093545@westminster.ac.uk with a headshot if interested and available.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ORANGE MONDAY LEFT. STOP. RIGHT. A APOLITICAL SATIRE ON LEADERSHIP, EGO, AND INSTITUTIONAL CARELESSNESS. WRITTEN BY ALESSIO VILELLA DIRECTED YB LEON PHILIPP'

items.text:
Hi everyone! I’m looking for crew to collaborate on a few upcoming short projects. If you’re a director, sound recordist, producer, makeup artist, AD, 1st AC, or work in any film department, please reach out. I’d love to have you on board.

Here’s a bit of my recent work. Thanks!

items.text:
✨ Client Spotlight | The Power of Voice in Animation & Games ✨
There is something truly otherworldly about Corbett Barklie’s voice — an ethereal quality that carries emotion, story, and soul. A voice shaped by a life deeply lived in the arts, and one that feels perfectly at home in the worlds of animation, games, and immersive storytelling.

Corbett isn’t just a brilliant voice artist and actor — she is a storyteller whose performances are informed by decades of creative leadership, collaboration, and human connection. In animation and gaming, where truth, imagination, and emotional depth matter most, lived experience is everything — and Corbett brings it in abundance.

With an extensive career across the arts in the USA and Northern Ireland, Corbett blends warmth, intelligence, and quiet power with absolute professionalism on mic. She connects instinctively with audiences, delivering performances that feel grounded, expansive, and unmistakably real.

Her influence behind the scenes is just as impressive:

Founder and Director of Loretta Theatre, Executive Director of ARTS Inc., Deputy Director of Development at Center Theatre Group, consultant and assessor for the NEA, Adjunct Professor at USC School of Theatre, and a champion of bold, unexpected collaborations through her work as a producer and arts consultant.

This is proof that it’s never too late to pivot, never too late to step into a new, vital skillset — and never too late to find your voice in animation, games, and beyond.

🎙️ Ready to elevate your voiceover work?

Book one-to-one coaching with us at pblvoiceover.com, DM us, or get in touch via the website.

Recalibrate. Refocus. Unlock your full creative Voiceover power.

items.title: ✨ Client Spotlight | The Power of Voice in Animation & Games ✨

items.text:
Audition Notice
“Scrooge! (Abbreviated Version)” 

Book, Music and Lyrics by Leslie Bricusse

From A Christmas Carol by Charles Dickens

A one-hour adaptation of the crowd-pleasing holiday musical!

In 1970, renowned writer/composer/lyricist Leslie Bricusse adapted the classic Charles Dickens tale A Christmas Carol into the hit screen musical Scrooge! 

A charming stage musical, Scrooge! 

Lyons Community Theatre

Auditions: Will be held at Planet Bluegrass Lab Building(Directions), on Friday, Oct 3rd, 5-7pm; Sunday, Oct 5th,  1-3pm and Monday, Oct 6th, 5-7pm  (If none of these days or times work for you, please contact georgi.pollard@gmail.com by Sunday, Oct 5th @12pm

Performance dates:

Friday, December 12th, 2025 @7pm 

Saturday, December 13th, 2025 @2pm & 7pm

Sunday, December 14th, 2025 @2pm 

@Planet Bluegrass Wildflower Pavillion 

All auditioners  will be asked to sing 16 measures from the musical or a verse from a familiar holiday song.

We will dance a few moves and those wanting a speaking role will read from the script. Everyone is encouraged to show off your English accent!  Although not necessary, you are welcome to bring a prepared song to share.  We will have an accompanist.

Roles are Non-Union | Unpaid

LCT encourages actors of all races, ethnicities, genders, ages, and abilities all ages to audition, welcoming performers from all backgrounds.

Performers may come on any one of the days or you may sign up using the Signup Genius link

Link to Sign up for an Audition Slot:

SIGN UP LINK

https://www.signupgenius.com/go/70A0A4BA4A723ABFE3-58313489-scrooge#/

items.title: Audition Notice

items.text:
🎭 Stage Production in Progress. Your seat might be on the stage.

We’re inviting purpose-driven creatives who are ready to serve, grow, and collaborate. We’re looking for actors, singers, dancers, musicians, writers, and production team members who value faith, excellence, and unity over spotlight. If you’re committed, teachable, and desire to use your gift to glorify God, this stage is being prepared for you.

🏀 **PAID NBA COMMERCIAL – BASKETBALL PLAYERS WANTED (ALL AGES)**

Hi everyone! My name is Jude, and I’m reaching out from House of Talent. We’re currently casting for an exciting paid commercial project for the NBA and are looking for amazing basketball players of all ages who may be a great fit.

We would love to connect with players, families, and coaches who might be interested in this opportunity!

Details:

• Ages 2 – 65+

• Non-Union

• Filming in Los Angeles

• Shoot Date: March 13

Compensation:

• $1000 + 20% per day filming

• $3000 + 20% usage

If you or someone you know might be a great fit, please submit or let them know!

**How to Apply**

Interested players or teams can view the full project details and submit directly through our secure casting portal, please make sure to select the right category. 

**Coaches / Referees**[ https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com](https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com/)

CASTING CALL! New LIFE OF CHRIST show with The Lantern Marquee, Performing May 25-30! Auditions (video submission) due Thurs 3/12, callbacks 3/14.
Why you want to be part of it:

🪨Performing as a themed dinner theatre at Provo's historic castle amphitheater, covered in lanterns!

🪨Music ONLY, no dialogue! Rehearsal schedule workable around your life. (required on-site dates: May 18-22; 25-30, evenings)

🪨Beautiful covers of 80's songs that have been carefully curated according to their spiritual analogues. (eg. "Who Wants to Live Forever," (cover by Il Volo) originally sung by Queen, is sung by Christ and the Disciples in our show. It’s amazing check it out:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RwKUxTMSs6M)

DM with questions!

Learn more and audition using this link:

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1IhT-JZE7AEzRCOAyqVS8P0PN6daj9G_z?usp=sharing

items.text:
Casting-Aufruf für Kurzfilmprojekt -- Proof of Concept Phase --Leidenschaftliche Zusammenarbeit -- Kassel

Hallo ihr Lieben! Ich arbeite derzeit an einem Kurzfilmprojekt in Kassel und suche begeisterte Schauspieler sowie einen 1st AC (Kameraassistenten/Focus puller), die mit uns zusammenarbeiten möchten. [Weitere freiwillige Crewmitglieder (sowie Maske, Ton, Helfer, etc.) sind willkommen.] Wir befinden uns aktuell in der Proof-of-Concept-Phase, in der wir eine Szene drehen werden, um anschließend eine Finanzierung für die vollständige Produktion zu sichern.

**Über das Projekt:**
* Titel: ALL IN
* Genre: Psychologischer Thriller
* Dauer: Circa 40
* Dauer Proof-of-Concept: 5 min
* Sprache: Englisch (Setsprache noch offen)
* Synopsis: Die Geschichte dreht sich um ein Pokerspiel, das als Plattform für vier Hauptfiguren dient, die sich mit ihrer Vergangenheit auseinandersetzen. Diese werden durch intensive Rückblenden dargestellt.

**Unser Vorgehen:**
* Wir drehen zunächst eine Testszene als Proof of Concept.
* Dieses Material wird genutzt, um ein Budget für die vollständige Produktion zu sichern.
* Table Read ist für April geplant und wird auf Englisch durchgeführt werden.
* Der Dreh des Proof-of-Concepts wird ebenfalls auf Englisch stattfinden.

**Wichtige Hinweise:**
* Schauspieler für Hauptrollen sollten bereit sein, sich Wissen über psychische Erkrankungen und deren charakteristische Merkmale anzueignen, um die Authentizität der Darstellungen zu erhöhen.
* Erforderliche Fähigkeiten: Darstellungen, die komplexe Emotionen wie Trauma, Konfrontation und Verzweiflung authentisch vermitteln; mit Fokus auf subtilem und realistischem Schauspiel.

**Gesuchte Rollen:** Wir sind bereits ein kleines Team, möchten aber trotzdem alle gesuchten Rollen hier noch einmal auflisten.

**Hauptfiguren:**
* Chris (25-40 Jahre) -- zurückgezogen, emotional aufgeladen, trägt eine schwere Last mit sich. Subtil, nie übertrieben.
* K (32-40 Jahre) -- instabil, verzweifelt, zwischen Kontrolle und Zusammenbruch.
> *John -- BESETZT -- dominant, arrogant, aber mit einer tiefen Verletzlichkeit darunter. Muss beides gleichzeitig spielen können.*
> *Trevor -- BESETZT -- kühl, unlesbar, beobachtend. Wenig Text, maximale Wirkung.*

**Nebenrollen:**
* Charlotte (15-17 Jahre) -- warm, fürsorglich, die emotionale Mitte des Films. Ihre Szene ist klein aber entscheidend. -- EVTL. BESETZT --
* Chris, jung (13-14 Jahre) -- wütend, verletzt, noch nicht in der Lage dies auszudrücken. Muss Stille spielen können.
* Vater (Stimme, kein Bild -- vorerst keine Erscheinung vor der Kamera notwendig) -- autoritär, kalt.
* Mutter (Details folgen)

**Weitere Informationen:**
* Essen wird zur Verfügung gestellt (mit veganer Option).
* Drehorte sind im Raum Kassel.
* Für die Proof-of-Concept-Phase kann leider keine Gage gezahlt werden. Anfahrtskosten können jedoch nach Absprache gegebenenfalls übernommen werden.
* Für die vollständige Produktion sind wir aktiv dabei, ein Budget zu sichern. Je nach gesicherter Finanzierung wird eine Gage für alle Darsteller angestrebt.
* Alle Beteiligten erhalten vollständige Credits sowie eine Kopie des fertigen Films.

Wenn du Interesse an einer kreativen, kollaborativen Zusammenarbeit und Lust darauf hast , deine Leidenschaft in einem atmosphärischen Projekt auszuleben, melde dich gerne bei mir! Teile den Beitrag gerne, wenn du jemanden kennst, der interessiert sein könnte. Ich freue mich darauf, von euch zu hören! mail: [maxmeyer414@gmail.com](mailto:maxmeyer414@gmail.com)

items.text:
RUSH CASTING CALL – ATLANTA

Project: Millenni Productions Web Series
Role: Daryl (Supporting)

Location: Atlanta, GA
Shoot Dates: March 22nd 
Rate: Paid 

Character Description – Daryl
Male, mid 20s to early 30s.
Confident, polished, and successful. Daryl is an established restaurant owner who carries himself like a man who has built something from the ground up. He’s smooth, charismatic, and comfortable in his environment. The type of guy people respect when he walks in the room.

Daryl is also a regular client at Sean’s barbershop and has a complicated history with Tayana.

Role Type: Supporting
Ethnicity: black 
Acting Experience: Preferred but not required

To Submit:
Send the following to: movies@millenniproductions.com

• Headshot or recent photo
• Acting reel (if available)
• Name, age, height
• Contact information
• Atlanta-based talent only

***AUDITION NOTICE***

BEYOND THE SEA (Staged Reading)

Author: Kristen DaSilva
Director: Chris Schuessler
Producer: Michele Partridge

**Audition Date: Wednesday, April 1, 6 PM
**Preparation: Sides will be emailed to selected auditioners
Production Dates: May 28-31, 2026 - Staged Reading
Rehearsals and Show Venue: Peninsula Productions, 14600 North Bluff Road, White Rock
Rehearsals: TBD
Actors are paid an honourarium and get free parking

Play Summary:
A staged reading of a bittersweet Canadian rom-com. Two 40-something strangers meet on a
small town pier - Theo waits for an overdue date who may or may not show up, while Gwen works
the ticket booth for a Ghost Tour boat ride. Theo frets over everything from his outfit choice to text
compositions, while Gwen calms him with dating advice and embarrassing stories of her own. As
the two slowly open up to each other, the play explores the strange tenderness of starting over
while struggling with loss and grief. Talk back after each show.

Characters:

THEO (40s) - has been cast

GWEN (40s) - is the emotional heart of Beyond the Sea by Kristen Da Silva. A widowed woman
living in a small seaside town, s h e is strong, capable, and quietly resilient, having built a life shaped
by love and sudden loss. Beneath her practical exterior lies deep grief, vulnerability, and a longing
she scarcely allows herself to acknowledge. The actor must be able to balance toughness with
tenderness, conveying both sharp wit and raw emotional honesty. Strong grounding in naturalistic
performance is essential, with the ability to navigate humour, silence, and heartbreak with
authenticity.

**To secure an audition time, please email your headshot and resume to:
Michele Partridge  - michele@peninsulaproductions.org by Sunday, March 29, 2026

We look forward to hearing from you!

www.peninsulaproductions.org

 #auditions #actors #stagedreading #whiterockbc #performers #supportlocal #southsurreybc #community #theatre #PeninsulaProductions

items.text:
NORTH LONDON and HERTFORDSHIRE AREAS
Science Boffins is currently looking for more phenomenal Science Boffins to help us to bring science to life for primary school children. We have parties, schools and events throughout the year.

You don't need a formal background in science as we teach you everything you'll need to know.

All you need is access to a car (unless London based), the ability to work some weekends/weekdays and the desire to launch rockets, concoct potions and generally share just how much fun science can be.

HOW DOES BEING A SCIENCE BOFFIN WORK?

For the right person, this could be the most fun way of making an extra income.

You'll get to enjoy inspiring and educating children, having a fantastic time and getting paid along the way. You'll travel to an event in your local area and bring science to life for primary school age children with some brilliant science experiments.

Are you a fun, enthusiastic and reliable person and able to communicate effectively and promptly to potential bookings? Then join a nationwide team of 40+ well-paid Science Boffin presenters.  We have a strong reputation, rave reviews, and the privilege of working with some globally recognised companies.

We're a friendly bunch and have a (we think!) cracking training program to help you get up to speed. If that sounds like you? You too can become one of our amazing Science Boffins and bring science alive to children.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Annette

Science Boffins

items.text:
# CASTING CALL: JOIN OUR ACTING HOBBY PODCAST

When a group of actors sit around a table and use their spoken words to portray characters all going on an adventure together, that's called a tabletop roleplaying game (TTRPG). Example famous TTRPG podcasts: Critical Role, The Adventure Zone, NADDPod, Dungeons and Daddies, Dimension 20. Our gaming group plays a variety of tabletop roleplaying games and publishes the audio as a podcast. We react as our character to the scenario presented by the game master. We respond to challenges, overcome obstacles, make jokes and laugh with our fellow acting friends. Would you enjoy acting in-character for a podcast audience? Join us.

# System played:

We get to learn and play a different tabletop roleplaying game (ttrpg) system each session. There’s no financial burden to you. The systems are either free to everyone or we were sent a promotional copy from its creator. Because we record and publish the audio of our game sessions, indie game developers get an actual play episode to show their game being actually played. Anyone can listen to and hear an example of their system in action. Actual play episodes help more people see how a game is played, and maybe try it themselves. It's why creators send us their rules for free. That's why we’re a podcast. There isn't any money involved. We just do this for fun.

# When we play:

Weekends. Flexible times. Both European and American time zones. Joining us doesn't commit you to every weekend. Instead, we pick games we want to try and sign up for those calendar spots. Members can see who's playing and what ttrpg and pick which sessions they sign up for.

# How long we play / what it’s like:

Our members sit at their microphones for four hours talking their way through an adventure using their words and laughter to entertain each other. The GM says out loud how far away targets are instead of us all looking at combat maps on a screen. Each player sketches or constructs their own battle map on their desk in front of them, using their own minis. So you'll be able to use your minis every game you play. The recordings are high quality, and we air the audio as a podcast. Don’t worry, we don’t publish our names or faces.

# Oneshot or campaign:

Both. Like a oneshot, each individual episode opens with a beginning to its plot, and the exploration of its story ends after four hours. Like a traditional campaign, we repeatedly meet familiar non player characters (NPCs), facing challenges and experiencing long term character growth. Our members make one character for the yearlong campaign and adapt our same character to each ttrpg rule system. The characters are roleplayed so they can’t tell their players are rolling different dice each week. For them, it’s one continuous campaign. Characters are low power level in January, grow to epic max fighting strength by December, then retire.

# Game Mastering (GMing):

We rotate so that everyone is invited to be a player and a game master if they want. The GM gets to pick which ttrpg we play that weekend. If you find a fun ttrpg you want to try, you can sign up as the GM and be confident that there will be players excited to play with you. If you prefer to be a player every time that’s cool, too. Our members don't have to GM ever if they want a break from it. Getting to pick how often you GM really helps relieve burnout. GM as often as makes you happy.

# You can vibe check past games:

We're on itunes, spotify, youtube, and all the podcast apps. Our cast rotates. Skip around and listen to snippets from a few episodes to see which of our members you want to play with first. The episodes aren't all great, but we have fun together. This isn't a job. It's a hobby, a way to relax and laugh meeting new people who slowly over time become lifelong friends. It's okay to miss games; you aren’t expected to be present for every session. The opt-in format naturally minimizes table trouble because you can see who’s signed up to GM and play in a game before you join it, and can pick dates that have people you’re looking forward to playing with.

# Joining:

To join, email us at Firebreathing Kittens Podcast at gmail dot com telling us about your equipment. To make sure everyone’s voice sounds good, we use microphones that capture 24 bit audio. Don’t worry if you’re not sure what 24 bit audio means. Our equipment guide (Firebreathing Kittens Podcast dot com) explains what all the microphone words mean and lists affordable options, including mics under fifty bucks. We’ll help show you how to get set up so you can focus on playing. Firebreathing Kittens Podcast dot com also answers frequently asked questions about our format. Beginners welcome. Minimum age 21 years old. No experience necessary. We will guide you through character creation and train you how to record great audio.

items.text:
CASTING CALL FOR A STUDENT FILM
2 lead roles available and extras wanted!!

Unpaid roles, Manchester based.

Self tapes wanted, contact elporter222@gmail.com if you’re interested and want to know more!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CAHL CLEM ............... Playing age: 14-18 (Over 18s only) Streetwear/2000s fashion sense. Middle class: Upper class accent, well spoken. Observant and introspective, navigating early independence with curiosity. Carries a subtle E intensity that draws people in. @Measuresshort'

May be an image of skateboard and text that says 'CASTING CALL LEO Playing age: 16-19 (Over 18s only) Skater/2000s 2000s fashion sense. Upper class but portrays himself as lower class. Outgoing, confident and sociable. Thrives on connection and enjoys making others feel included. FREE SKATEBOARD INCLUDED'

May be a graphic of text that says 'SUNOPSIS Set over a single afternoon in a skatepark, the film follows 16yr old Clem as she reconnects with old friend Leo, who offers to teach her how to skate. He refills her cup between attempts, starting as a sinister favour. As Clem continues, intoxi intoxication begins to compromise her balance and judgement, increasing the risk of each attempt. Leo's encouragement shifts into control as he recognises her growing instability. In the exposed park, Clem's deterioration becomes visible to others, raising questions of responsibility and transforming what began as a carefree reunion into a situation marked by vulnerability. @Measuresshort'

May be an image of text that says 'cous YOU OUBeTHE Next NYJAH HUSTON? APPLY TO BE BEA A BACKGROUND SKATER IN OUR 2000S INSPIRED SHORT FILM! MUST BE ABLE TO OLLIE OVER 18s ONLY ALL GENDERS WANTED SEND US YOUR BEST SKATE CLIPS! AROUND LATE MARCH TO EARLY APRIL @Measuresshort'

items.text:
🎭 **CASTING CALL – Professor Sylas *London Based Only***

Due to personal circumstances, we are **recasting the role of Professor Sylas** in our original jukebox musical **“A Place Not Mine.”**

The story takes place at **Novaterra University**, a magical academy where students struggle to discover who they truly are. Professor Sylas is one of the university’s strict and respected teachers, challenging students to prove their power and their place at the school.

📍 **Performances:**
5th & 6th July
Drayton Arms Theatre – London

🎭 **Rehearsals:**
Once per week
• One online rehearsal / One in-person rehearsal at **Middlesex University**

📩 **To apply, send to:**
**emilvasilev296@gmail.com**

Please include:
• Headshot, CV, Singing video (Disney or musical theatre song), Acting reel (if available)
• **Phone number**

Selected actors will be contacted directly.

⏳ **Casting is open until the role is filled.**

💼 **Compensation:**
This is an **independent production currently in development**, therefore participation is unpaid at this stage. We are **in discussions for funding**, and if funding is secured the project will become **paid.**

**We are waiting for you! **

CASTING CALL FOR A STUDENT FILM
2 lead roles available and extras wanted!!

Unpaid roles, Manchester based.

Self tapes wanted, contact elporter222@gmail.com if you’re interested and want to know more!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of skateboard and text that says 'CASTING CALL LEO Playing age: 16-19 (Over 18s only) Skater/2000s 2000s fashion sense. Upper class but portrays himself as lower class. ....... Outgoing, confident and sociable. Thrives on connection and enjoys making others feel included. FREE SKATEBOARD INCLUDED'

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL CLEM ...... Playing age: 14-18 (Over 18s only) Streetwear/2000s fashion sense. Middle class: Upper class accent, well spoken. Observant and introspective, navigating early independence with curiosity. Carries a subtle E. intensity that draws people in. @Measuresshort'

May be a graphic of text that says 'SUNOPSIS Set over a single afternoon in a skatepark, the film follows 16yr old Clem as she reconnects with old friend Leo, who offers to teach her how to skate. He refills her cup between attempts, starting as a sinister favour. As Clem continues, intoxi intoxication begins to compromise her balance and judgement, increasing the risk of each attempt. Leo's encouragement shifts into control as he recognises her growing instability. In the exposed park, Clem's deterioration becomes visible to others, raising questions of responsibility and transforming what began as a carefree reunion into a situation marked by vulnerability. @Measuresshort'

May be an image of text that says 'cous YOU OUBeTHE Next NYJAH HUSTON? APPLY TO BE BEA A BACKGROUND SKATER IN OUR 2000S INSPIRED SHORT FILM! MUST BE ABLE TO OLLIE OVER 18s ONLY ALL GENDERS WANTED SEND US YOUR BEST SKATE CLIPS! AROUND LATE MARCH TO EARLY APRIL @Measuresshort'

items.text:
Casting Call — Female Models (NYC, All 5 Boroughs)

MMPRODUCTIONSFILMS is casting female models across all five boroughs of New York City — Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, The Bronx, and Staten Island — for upcoming cinematic visual clips. These projects blend clean framing, emotional presence, and modern NYC energy.

What I’m Looking For
- Women with strong presence and feminine confidence  
- Comfortable on camera and able to take direction  
- Reliable, professional, and aligned with a creative environment  
- Ages 20–35  

What You Receive
- Cinematic footage for your portfolio  
- A complimentary personal photo shoot you can use anytime you need updated photos  
- A professional, respectful, and well‑organized creative space  
- Exposure through final published visuals  

Details
- Locations: Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, The Bronx, Staten Island  
- Dates: Flexible  
- Compensation: TFP collaboration (no monetary pay) + free future photo session  
- Roles: Featured model, supporting model, lifestyle scenes, artistic visuals  

To Submit
Send your name, recent photos, IG/portfolio link, and availability.

items.text:
Casting call for a USC Thesis film Red Fox Run, will have a festival run
Director: Scott Wilson

Logline: Ray Fox thinks he can hide a mob’s drug deal under the cover of a charity golf tournament at his family’s golf course, Red Fox Run—right up until the cops knock on the front door. An original story with heart, humor, and doing bad for the sake of good. Let's bring back the low budget comedy!

Actor Roles we need to fill are as follows;
Deadline is March 15th

We will be filming at the Griffith Park Clubhouse 

Calltime: 9:30 a.m.

Date: March 18th

50 Enthusiastic Golf Course Patrons
2 Mobsters disguised as priests

Please send actor resume and headshots to
Redfoxrunusc@gmail.com or DM Becky Bruner (this would be the best email for any information you may have) this is voluntary, includes IMBD credit as well as crafty and lunch

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'DIRECTED AND WRITTEN BY SCOTT WILSON RED ROXE CALL CASTING RUN SHOOT DATE: MARCH 18,2026 RAY FOX THINKS HE CAN HIDE A MOB'S DRUG DEAL UNDER THE COVER OF A CHARITY GOLF TOURNAMENT AT HIS FAMILY'S GOLF COURSE, RED FOX RUN-RIGHT UP UNTIL THE COPS KNOCK ON THE FRONT DOOR. GENRE: COMEDY COMPENSATION: UNPAID/NONUNION, MEALS PROVIDED, CRAFTY, AND IMDB CREDIT LOOKING FOR GOLF COURSE PATRONS AND MOBSTERS DISGUISED AS PRIESTS'

items.text:
Actriz para Instagram Stories - España
📍 Remoto, trabajo según el encargo técnico

Se busca actriz para grabar videos cortos para Instagram y Stories. La actriz debe desempeñar el papel de astróloga y grabar videos sobre este tema, así como contenido en vivo para interactuar con la audiencia.

💰 Sueldo: 800-1200€

🎯 Qué hacer:

✅ Grabar videos cortos según el encargo técnico (enviamos el texto) varias veces a la semana

✅ Grabar contenido en vivo (en la calle, en cafeterías, etc.)

✅ Tomar fotos y participar en sesiones fotográficas

🔗 Requisitos:

✔️ Hablar de manera clara y tener una apariencia agradable

✔️ Cumplir con los plazos

✔️ Edad entre 28 y 40 años

✔️ Responsabilidad

✔️ Anonimato: no publicar contenido laboral en tu perfil

‼️ Solo colaboración a largo plazo

Si te interesa, escribe por WhatsApp o correo electrónico:

Nombre

Edad

¿Tienes experiencia similar?

❌ No consideramos bloggers ni personas públicas. Tampoco consideramos a quienes siempre están grabando publicidad o actuando como extras.

👤 Contacto:

📱 Katya (WhatsApp) +380966751530

Correo electrónico: katrin.astro.digital@gmail.com

*⃣ WA: wa.me/966751530

Hi there, I am a professional actor and have been in many TV series, game shows and student films. DM ME!!!
I am located in Melbourne Australia. With his story, passion, experience and a really great body. I am now ready to work with casting directors and members of this film community. 

So yes, I’m now looking for a real opportunity to showcase my talent live on screen. 3 2 1 ACTION!!! 🎬

My name is David RC Windsor 

📧 Email: windsord509@gmail.com 

📱 Contact: 0480 538 378 

Let's go from dreams to movie screens.

CASTING CALL – PRO BASEBALL PLAYERS ⚾

We’re scouting professional baseball players for a PAID TV commercial shooting in Cape Town in early March 2026.

Looking for:

Pro Baseball Players (Pitchers / Batters / Umpires)

Men, 25–35 years

Any ethnicity

If you fit the brief or know someone who does, please send your details to studio@zestcasting.com
.

⏰ Deadline: 9 March 2026

Feel free to tag or share with any baseball players in Cape Town who should see this!

We’re looking for experienced Electric Keyboard Pianists to feature in an upcoming PAID TV commercial shooting in Cape Town.

Requirements:

• Age 35 – 55 years
• Any ethnicity

items.text:
FINANCING YOUR FILM WITHOUT LOSING YOUR MIND
A Producer's Guide to Getting Your Movie Made Post-COVID and Strikes

🎬 ANNOUNCEMENT: “Financing Your Film Without Losing Your Mind” is NOW AVAILABLE! 📘

After raising over $20M across independent films, I’ve poured every hard-earned lesson, brutal truth, and proven strategy into this producer’s guide—written for today’s post-COVID, post-strikes landscape.

This isn’t theory. It’s field intelligence from someone closing deals right now.

You’ll learn:

✅ Why 199 “no’s” for every “yes” is normal (and how to survive it)
✅ How to leverage tax credits so a £4M film needs only £2.8M in equity
✅ Why most investor pitches fail in the first 30 seconds
✅ The psychology investors won’t tell you (but reveals their decisions)
✅ How to close financing in 60 days instead of wasting years

The book is now live on Amazon in both paperback and Kindle formats!

👉 GET YOUR COPY HERE: https://www.amazon.co.uk/About-Finance-Financing-Without-loosing-ebook/dp/B0GFPTDQL5 

👉 Secure it directly from MARKIT PRODUCTIONS HERE: https://markitproductions.co.uk/publishing

Join the Markit Community for exclusive updates, live Q&As, and a network of filmmakers who are actually getting films made.

All book buyers can access special offers:
Early community access (2 weeks before launch)
20% discount on your first consulting call
20% discount on all Consulting Packages
50% discount on all Document Review Services
30% discount on all Production Services
30-minute group Q&A with one of the Markit team

Explore our full range of services:
Production Services: https://markitproductions.co.uk/productionservices
Markit Publishing: https://markitproductions.co.uk/publishing

Let’s stop losing our minds and start financing our films.

#FilmFinance #FilmProducer #IndependentFilm #FilmFunding #MovieBusiness #FilmProduction #MarkitProductions

We are having so much fun in THE GREAT BRITISH BAKE OFF MUSICAL rehearsals!!

Yesterday we staged Slap It Like That - how many jokes can there be about dough!!!

We are still looking for a male performer for the role of BEN (bari/tenor 30s/40s) so if you are interested in this wonderful role and can join us for the show then please email or PM me - harri@brooksidetheatre.com 

Show w/c 4th May 2026

Venue: Brookside Theatre, Romford 

Rehearsals: Monday & Wednesday evenings and Sunday daytimes by a schedule (plus Thursday evenings nearer show week in April)

**This is a charity production offering a split of opening night ticket sales to the cast**

#casting #greatbritishbakeoffmusical #musicaltheatre #london #essex

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL FOR A DEVELOPMENT WORKSHOP OF A NEW PLAY**

**DETAILS:**

Play: ***Ringworm *****(working title)**

Author: **Susie Weidmann**

Dates: **Tuesday 7 – Friday 10 April, 10am – 6pm**

Location: **Southwark, London**

Compensation: **£100 ***

***We are looking for 4 actors, with a playing age of between 18 – 27. All actors must be over the age of 18.***

About the play: Buddy and Ella, recently coupled and flushed by each other’s novelty, decide to move into the adjoining bedroom in George and Sophie’s flat. The paper-thin walls allow conversations, sex, and infidelity to collapse on both relationships. This is a play about constant spillage: of deep-rooted truths, of excess and confused emotion, of physical lust, of relationships as containers which can’t quite satisfy the desires of the two people within.

For this workshop no sexual/intimate moments will be simulated.

Praise for previous work: ‘piercing and uncompromising … [Weidmann’s] script had me trapped, stretched to breaking point, between the twin poles of laughter and tears’ (*President’s Husband’s Reviews*).

**HOW TO AUDITION:**

1. Record a self-tape with:
* An introductory slate stating your name, height, and anything else you’d like to share;
* A contemporary monologue of your choice written after 1980 (it can be one you’ve written); and then
* Tell us a short story: what is one of your biggest regrets? What happened? Why?

Please submit the self-tape as one video (but you can stitch 3 clips together).

2. Fill out the form below linking your self-tape by **23:59, Wednesday 18 March** (but earlier is always appreciated):

# **[https://forms.gle/Hdvtspn2q5mqGkBr9](https://forms.gle/Hdvtspn2q5mqGkBr9)**

We will email every applicant within 24 hours confirming receipt of their submission, and all applicants will be emailed with the outcome of their audition.

If you have any questions, please feel to get in touch at [honeysroomprod@gmail.com](mailto:honeysroomprod@gmail.com)

Will Shackleton (Producer), Vita Hamilton (Director), Susie Weidmann (Writer)

* We are current students and recent grads so unfortunately so are not able to pay much, but wanted to offer something towards travel/food/token of appreciation.

This is a play about constant spillage: of deep-rooted truths, of excess and confused emotion, of physical lust, of relationships as containers which can’t quite satisfy the desires of the two people within.

For this workshop no sexual/intimate moments will be simulated.

Praise for previous work: ‘piercing and uncompromising … [Weidmann’s] script had me trapped, stretched to breaking point, between the twin poles of laughter and tears’ (*President’s Husband’s Reviews*).

**HOW TO AUDITION:**

1. Record a self-tape with:
* An introductory slate stating your name, height, and anything else you’d like to share;
* A contemporary monologue of your choice written after 1980 (it can be one you’ve written); and then
* Tell us a short story: what is one of your biggest regrets? What happened? Why?

Please submit the self-tape as one video (but you can stitch 3 clips together).

2. Fill out the form below linking your self-tape by **23:59, Wednesday 18 March** (but earlier is always appreciated):

# **[https://forms.gle/Hdvtspn2q5mqGkBr9](https://forms.gle/Hdvtspn2q5mqGkBr9)**

We will email every applicant within 24 hours confirming receipt of their submission, and all applicants will be emailed with the outcome of their audition.

If you have any questions, please feel to get in touch at [honeysroomprod@gmail.com](mailto:honeysroomprod@gmail.com)

Will Shackleton (Producer), Vita Hamilton (Director), Susie Weidmann (Writer)

* We are current students and recent grads so unfortunately so are not able to pay much, but wanted to offer something towards travel/food/token of appreciation.

items.text:
CASTING CALL!

"DAB," a Student Film - BRISTOL - March 15-22

*In the 2 weeks after a riot, a young black man attempts to live a normal life whilst an unjust legal system closes in.*

ACTORS:

**Protagonist's Father**

Lead. Male. 40-55

Quiet, disciplined, and steady. Runs the garage with pride and believes in keeping your head down and working hard. Loves his son deeply but struggles to show it, relying on control and routine instead.

Ethnicity: Black 

**Protagonist's Mother**

Lead. Female. 40-55

Warm, perceptive, and sharp. Helps run the family garage and reads people quickly, especially her son. Humour comes easily, but beneath it is a protective instinct and hard-earned wisdom.

Ethnicity: Black 

APPLY HERE:

[https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3110710/dab/?role_id=5477518](https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3110710/dab/?role_id=5477518)

OR CONTACT:

We are having so much fun in THE GREAT BRITISH BAKE OFF MUSICAL rehearsals!!

Yesterday we staged Slap It Like That - how many jokes can there be about dough!!!

We are still looking for a male performer for the role of BEN (bari/tenor 30s/40s) so if you are interested in this wonderful role and can join us for the show then please email or PM me - harri@brooksidetheatre.com 

Show w/c 4th May 2026

Venue: Brookside Theatre, Romford 

Rehearsals: Monday & Wednesday evenings and Sunday daytimes by a schedule (plus Thursday evenings nearer show week in April)

**This is a charity production offering a split of opening night ticket sales to the cast**

items.text:
**Casting Call - Volunteer, Non-union, IMDB credit, Snippet**

I'm casting for a comedy film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film. 

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

**Casting:**
Jason (23-35) Caucasian, charismatic, manipulative, eloquent, materialistic, pushy, and cynical. He is a dating guru who teaches Vijay dating lessons. Shoot on 4th April.

items.text:
SHORT FILM CASTING CALL!!!
Casting "Waiting Room," a short film. Three siblings come to a hospital because they have been told that their dad is going in for emergency surgery that could lead to him losing his life. Whilst in the waiting room, there is a tension that hangs above all of them, of something unsaid about past abuse.

Roles: 

Willow (27-30)

Outgoing and vibrant, but there’s far more going on beneath the surface. She’s a contradiction: at times she seems unable to read the room, yet she has a deep, almost instinctive understanding of what others are feeling. This raises the question - why can she see everyone else so clearly, but not herself?

Olivia (29-32)

The matriarch of the family. She isn’t Willow and Lucas’s mother, but they both look up to her as if she were. She carries quiet authority, and with it, the weight of responsibility - she has always been the one forced to make the hard decisions. She may have sensed that Willow and Lucas were carrying something, but she never knew the full truth until now.

Shoots 27th-29th March in Salford/Manchester, TBA.

Please send your headshot, resume/spotlight with any examples of work to Kelsielea123@hotmail.com

PLEASE NOTE: These are unpaid roles! Showreel footage, travel and food expenses will be paid.

items.text:
Sam – Male Lead
Sam is a white/light-skinned man in his mid-20s to early-30s, Quietly intense. The kind of man who doesn’t speak unless he has something worth saying.

He is sweet, loving, kind, protective his main motivation is being with his family and protecting them. ACTOR MUST BE BASED IN OHIO

Physically, Sam should appear athletic or naturally solid. not bodybuilder ripped, but strong in a believable way. Think former high school athlete who still works with his hands or stays active. A slight dad-bod edge is completely fine. He should feel capable.

Appearance-wise:

 • Scruffy or slightly rugged is ideal.

 • Facial hair preferred (short beard/stubble).

 • Manly, natural look — not polished or overly groomed

items.text:
LOS ANGELES… this is the very FIRST show.

The cherry-poppin’ kickoff of my brand new comedy tour and reality television series.

Yes… we are actually filming the show.

So if you’ve ever wanted to accidentally end up on television while laughing at a pastor, a porn star, and a lineup of chaotic comedians… this is your moment.

Only 28 seats.
This is an intimate VIP comedy night.

Doors open at 7PM so come early, take pictures with me and the comedians, grab autographs, say hi, and get comfortable before we start filming.

Show starts at 7:30PM.

Also show love to the venue by ordering food or drinks (two-item minimum). Keep the drinks flowing so the laughs keep coming.

If this show sells out — and it probably will — you’ll miss the very first night of the tour.

And nobody wants to be the person saying:
“I heard the first show was legendary.”

Come be part of the chaos.

🎟 Tickets: C3TIX.COM
📍 The Living Room DTLA @thelivingroomdtla

#christylove #standupcomedy #losangelescomedy #comedyshow #comedynight
