items.text:
Recruitment of a Foreign House Band for Live Music Lounge “RUBIK” at Paradise City 🎷🎵🎼

Paradise City, South Korea’s premier art and entertainment resort, is recruiting a stylish and professional foreign house band to perform in the premium live lounge “RUBIK” during the second half of 2026.

Dongil Entertainment, in partnership with Paradise City, invites talented artists to collaborate.

✅ 1. General Information

Performance Venue:

Live Music Lounge “RUBIK,” 1st Floor, Paradise City

Band Requirements:

Foreign band consisting of at least 5 members (including a vocalist)

Music Genres:

Urban, Groove, Funky, Synth-Pop, etc.

Modern, vibrant, and commercially appealing setlist tailored to MZ generation tastes and the “Young & Rich” concept.

The performance must match the refined atmosphere of a hotel lounge and integrated resort (IR Resort).

✅ 2. Performance Period & Conditions

Contract Period:

July 1, 2026 (Wednesday) – December 31, 2026 (Thursday)

(Approximately 6 months)

Possibility of contract extension up to 1 year depending on audience response and operational results.

Performance Schedule:

Tuesday to Sunday (6 days per week), 21:00–23:00

1st Set: 21:00–21:50 (50 minutes)

2nd Set: 22:10–23:00 (50 minutes)

✅ Provided:

Salary: $2,000 net per month

(Paid in Korean won; taxes covered by the company)

Accommodation and meals for the artists

Visa (E-6) support, round-trip airfare coverage, and administrative assistance

✅ 3. Qualifications & Technical Requirements

Qualifications:

No restrictions for international travel or stay in the Republic of Korea (including eligibility for E-6 visa)

Experience performing in hotel lounges or equivalent stage professionalism, visual image, and performance quality

Technical Specifications:

Main Console: Midas Pro2C

Sound System: Martin Audio MLA Compact & Subwoofers

Monitors: Martin Audio LE1200

A professional sound engineer will be provided.

Drum kit and keyboards may be provided on site.

All other personal instruments and equipment must be supplied by the artists.

✅ 4. Selection Process

Application Deadline: March 13, 2026 (Friday) – strictly enforced

Internal Review: Individual notification after application period closes

Final Selection: Approximately April 1, 2026

Contract Signing: Approximately April 17, 2026

Performance Start Date: July 1, 2026

✅ 5. Required Documents & Application Method

Required Materials:

1) Proposal Presentation:

- Band profile

- Member information (nationality and role in the band)

- Repertoire list

2) Professional photos (high quality, preferably smart/semi-formal style)

3) Performance videos:

- Minimum 3 live performance videos

- Links or files (covering different genres)

✅Application Method:

Submit by email.

Contact for applications and inquiries:

Dongil Entertainment

idongilmaster@gmail.com

"পাপ সে ধরতি ফাটি- ফাটি- ফাটি-
অধরম্ সে আসমান- আসমান- আসমান-
অত্যাচার সে কাঁপি ইনসানিয়ৎ-
রাজ় কর রহে হ্যায়বান- হ্যায়বান- হ্যায়বান-
জিনকি হোগি তাকৎ অপূরব্-
জিনকি হোগা নিশানা অভেদ, 
জো করেঙ্গে ইনকা সর্বনাশ
ও কহেলাঙ্গে ত্রিদেব- ত্রিদেব- ত্রিদেব-"

ত্রিদেব... সানি-জ্যাকি-নাসির 🤪😝🤪

আজ, তপন থিয়েটারে, শ্রী ব্রাত্য বসু রচিত, সুদীপ্ত দত্ত নির্দেশিত, গয়েশপুর সংলাপ প্রযোজিত 'হেমলাট- দ্য প্রিন্স অফ্ গরাণহাটা' নাটকের মধ্যান্তরে। 

#rakeshghoshplaywright #BratyaBasu #bengalitheatre

items.text:
Hi guys! 

Posting for a second time as we’re still on the hunt! Also have slightly more info to share. Please read below carefully and send me a message if you fit the profile and are interested in auditioning. 

I’m urgently casting for a new TV series shooting in London from the end of May. 

I need a young white male 18 - 24. You need to be funny, wild and a rule breaker. AGE is really important!!! They also need to be from London. The more authentic the better! 

Also looking for another male actor 18 - 21 for another role in the same show. This character is an estate agent with much higher ambitions. Slightly reserved but willing to bend rules to get the job done. 

Please comment below or send me a DM for more info. We are casting urgently so need to move fairly quickly. Free agents are preferable but not necessary. Get in touch asap!!

items.text:
Crew call - passion project short film
Northwest based

Hi everyone. I am looking for a DOP and Sound engineer both with their own equipment to collaborate on my short film as co-producers with me. Unfortunately this film was all set to be filmed this month, but the DOP let me down last minute and pulled out, leaving me to reschedule everything to hopefully shoot next month. 

The film, one last one,  is a character-driven short film that explores guilt, grief, and the human desire for forgiveness. It questions whether redemption is always attainable, or something we must learn to live without. At its core, the film asks a simple but painful question: How do we live with the consequences of our worst decisions?

The story is set on the Lytham seafront, a location that feels both expansive and isolating. The open sea represents freedom and escape, while the promenade acts as a liminal space—a threshold between past and present, life and memory. By placing the characters against this stark landscape, I want to emphasise their emotional exposure and the weight they carry within themselves.

Shawn and Rob are not villains or heroes; they are deeply flawed men shaped by addiction, anger, and regret. Their conversation is quiet, restrained, and grounded in realism, allowing the audience to sit with the discomfort rather than be guided by overt exposition. The flashbacks are fragmented and impressionistic, reflecting how memory intrudes upon the present. 

The film also represents as lesson, that one moment of bad decision making can destroy so many lives, and leave someone beyond redemption. 

This is a passion project so no funding currently available, but I am looking to collaborate with fellow filmmakers as co producers, specifically looking for DOP with own equipment and Sound Engineer with own equipment. I want to build a small solid team of motivated and passionate filmmakers, where we can collaborate on future projects together and possibly create our own production company producing great short films and beyond.

I have a great network of actors so this base is covered. 

Please comment below if you are interested and I will message my details for further correspondence.

items.text:
CREATIVES WANTED. Step into purpose and growth. 🎭✨

We’re inviting singers, dancers, actors, musicians, writers, creatives, and artists of all kinds to be part of a huge stage production.

This is more than a performance. It’s a learning experience.

✨ Training, guidance, and creative development will be provided

✨ Grow in skill, discipline, teamwork, and purpose

✨ Use your gifts in a meaningful, mission-driven environment

Whether you’re experienced or still discovering your craft, there’s room to learn, train, and rise together.

Message us to learn more and take your first step into this journey.🌍✨

A major television network is now casting couples nationwide for a relationship court show.

We are seeking:

    •    Couples and married couples

    •    People in relationships with children

If you or someone you know is:

items.text:
**Casting Call – On-Camera Host (Sports / Travel Show)**

I’m producing a new YouTube series about visiting and ranking baseball stadium experiences across the country, and we’re currently looking for an **on-camera host**.

The show combines sports, food, and travel — think exploring stadiums, trying local food, interviewing fans, and experiencing the atmosphere of each ballpark.

Looking for someone who is:

• Comfortable on camera

• Energetic and personable

• Able to improvise and interact with fans

• Knowledge or love of baseball is a plus

The first episode will be filmed in the **Lehigh Valley area** and the role is **paid**.

If interested, please send:

• A short intro video or reel

• Any relevant hosting/on-camera experience

Message me directly or email:

brandon.a@mustardsquadhq.com

topComments.text: Quinn Gardner is a super personable, energetic, and funny guy. He knows quite a bit on sports too. He also used to work in radio so he has that quick idea question interview mojo a host needs.
I’m interested and experienced

**CASTING CALL – THE PRICE OF POWER**

KingsVisuals Productions is currently **casting for primary and secondary roles** in the upcoming independent short film **“The Price of Power.”**

We are looking for actors of **all races and backgrounds** to be part of this faith-centered supernatural drama exploring themes of **faith, temptation, spiritual authority, and redemption.**

 **Roles Available:**

Primary roles and supporting characters, view poster/send email for additional  info.

 **Location:** Grand Rapids, Michigan
 **Production Schedule:** Shooting planned for sometime this **Summer or Fall 2026**

This is an **independent, non-paid project**, but **on-screen credit will be provided**, and it is a great opportunity to collaborate on a meaningful film project.

📩 **How to Submit:**

Send the following to **[Kingsideview@gmail.com](mailto:Kingsideview@gmail.com)**

We welcome both **experienced actors and new talent** who are passionate about storytelling.

Feel free to share this post with anyone who might be interested.

**KingsVisuals Productions**
Grand Rapids, Michigan

items.text:
Til tv-serien De Bedste Familier (DR) søges i Jylland:

Ledig, mandlig statistrolle, alder ca. 30 - 45 år, som funktionær. 
Du skal kunne være med til begge optagelsesdage
16/3 ca. 15 - 02.30 og igen 17/3 ca. kl. 11 - 22.30 i Handest Jylland.

Der er kostume/sminkeprøve i Agger på tirsdag d. 10. marts et aftalt tidspunkt ml. 14-19.

Der er i alt 1800 kr. honorar for 
2 optagelsesdage og 1 sminke/kostumeprøve. 
Der er forplejning tilpasset tidsrum på optagelsesdage.
Udgifter til f.eks. transport refunderes ikke.
Evt. overnatninger refunderes ikke.

Følgende krav til krop og udseende pga. tilgængelige kostumer og tidsperioden:

NB! Danmark var ikke så beriget med forskellige nationaliteter, så du skal ligne en med dansk/nordeuropæisk herkomst.

MÆND:
max højde 186, tøjstr. S-L (der er ingen kostume i XL eller over), ingen synlige tatoveringer med skjorte på inkl. håndled eller piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet med mindre gråt, korthåret men nok længde til at kunne sætte sideskilning, ingen kronraget eller karseklippet, ingen skæg på optagelsesdage.

Vi skal kende følgende for at komme i betragtning, som skal sendes i en mail til ajlystbaek@hotmail.com

Navn, alder, mobilnummer, højde, tøjstr., skostr., mål: hoved-hals-bryst-talje-hofte og inseam/outseam.
Der skal være to helt nye billeder: vellignende billede i helfigur samt et selfie, hvor hår og ansigt ses tydeligt.

sharedPost.text:
Hej alle😊

Jeg er 22 år og kommer fra Viborg. 
Min største drøm er at blive skuespiller, og jeg vil virkelig gerne udvikle mig mere. Jeg har været statist i spillefilm, kortfilm og reklamer/kampagner og er klar på at lære endnu mere  foran kameraet.

Jeg er samarbejdsvillig, imødekommende, meget lære nem og mødestabil. ￼￼￼

Kender I til auditions, projekter eller workshops, så må I meget gerne sige til 🙌

Hvis i er interesseret, må i meget gerne skrive til mig på Messenger.￼

Tak på forhånd 
Mvh Maja

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.
May be an image of one or more people and blonde hair

topComments.text: Hej Maja. Jeg er også fra Viborg. Prøv at kontakte Medieskolen i Viborg. Deres elever producerer mange kortfilm hvert år, og de bruger skuespillere udefra. Det er selvfølgelig ulønnet, men det er noget af den bedste erfaring, du kan få som skuespiller. Jeg ligger selv i deres "kartotek" og laver af og til film med deres elever.

Are you ready to step into your power and walk the global stage?

🔥 This is more than a casting this is elite runway preparation.

🔴 DATES & TIMES

🚨 Casting & Model Workshop

💃🏽 March 7, 2026 
11:30am-2:30PM

🟡 March 8, 2026
Free Eco Lux Organic Professional Body Airbrush Workshop

🟡 Fittings
March 13 & 14 | 3:30–8:00 PM

📍 Location: Ola Ka‘ilima ARTSPACE, Loft Room 332📞 CALL ONLY: (808) 726-4614

We are calling serious, disciplined, and committed models who are ready to grow, learn, and represent on an international level, for the past 33 years, every season we showcase twice a year in  New York to London, Milan, Paris, Berlin, Los Angeles, Miami, and Hawai‘i.
This is your opportunity to train, elevate, and prepare for the 2026 World Fashion Expo Hawai‘i at the Marriott Waikīkī Resort & Spa on March 15, 2026.

Come prepared. Come focused. Come ready to work.

🌟 Train with purpose.🌟 Walk with power.🌟 Own the runway.

#ModelCastingCall #RunwayWorkshop #InternationalRunway #FashionWeekPrep #GlobalFashion #ParadiseIslandFashionWeek

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon, Movietime im Doppelpack

Los geht's bereits um 17h, wo wir das 50jährige Anniversary der ROCKY HORROR PICTURE SHOW so richtig zelebrieren. Nebst vielen Songs aus dem Kultfilm präsentieren wir passend zum Start der Musicaladaption am 13.3.26 jede Menge Interviews mit dem A Capella Chor Mistelbach. Tauchen Sie mit uns ein in die schräge Welt des Dr Frankenfurter. 

Um 18h folgt die reguläre MT Ausgabe mit Taschentuchalarm. 

Kenna verliert nach einem tragischen Unfall ihre große Liebe und wagt einen Neuanfang. FÜR IMMER EIN TEIL VON DIR ist der neueste Tränendrücker aus der Feder von Colleen Hoover.

Theaterzeit im Weinviertel, LANG LEBE JOSEFIN lief anfang des Jahres in Hadres und kam dabei mit dem Gesetz in Konflikt. Wir blickten in einem Interview mit der Theatergruppe Hadres hinter die Kulissen. 

Abgerundet wird die Sendung im Oscarmonat März mit Awardwinnern best Song and best Score der letzten 90 Jahre.

Mittwoch 11.3.2026 von 17 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.text:
Hi guys! 

Posting for a second time as we’re still on the hunt! Also have slightly more info to share. Please read below carefully and send me a message if you fit the profile and are interested in auditioning. 

I’m urgently casting for a new TV series shooting in London from the end of May. 

I need a young white male 18 - 24. You need to be funny, wild and a rule breaker. AGE is really important!!! They also need to be from London. The more authentic the better! 

Also looking for another male actor 18 - 21 for another role in the same show. This character is an estate agent with much higher ambitions. Slightly reserved but willing to bend rules to get the job done. 

Please comment below or send me a DM for more info. We are casting urgently so need to move fairly quickly. Free agents are preferable but not necessary. Get in touch asap!!

items.title: Hi guys!

items.text:
We are casting a series of fast-paced, 30-second (UNPAID) STUDENT PROJECT Specsaver adverts paying homage to the legendary, culturally iconic "Should've gone to..." advertising campaign. This project is all about visual humour, oblivious confidence, and impeccable comedic timing.

We are looking for actors who excel at deadpan delivery and physical comedy. If you can play a character who is hilariously, confidently, and completely wrong about their surroundings, we want to see you!

We will cover meals and drinks as well as travel (Within the merseyside area)

filmed on high quality professional equipment as well as a professional environment and crew

This project will provide you with:
-Showreel footage material
-On-screen credits
-acting experience with a professionally run student production

IF INTERESTED MESSAGE ME PRIVATELY OR APPLY ON OUR MANDY 

https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3113999/specsaver-ads/
